name: balloon_deflate
description: Start balloon service, run service stop/start cycle, verify resilience

test_steps.guest_run: $blnsvr = Get-ChildItem -Recurse C:\AutoHCK\balloon_pkg -Filter blnsvr.exe | Select-Object -First 1; if (-not $blnsvr) { throw 'blnsvr.exe not found' }; & $blnsvr.FullName -i; Start-Sleep 2; if ((Get-Service BalloonService).Status -ne 'Running') { Start-Service BalloonService }; Write-Output "Service started: $((Get-Service BalloonService).Status)"
Stop-Service BalloonService -Force; Start-Sleep 2; $s = Get-Service BalloonService; Write-Output "Stopped: $($s.Status)"

Start-Service BalloonService; Start-Sleep 2; $s = Get-Service BalloonService; if ($s.Status -ne 'Running') { throw "Service did not restart: $($s.Status)" }; Write-Output "PASS: BalloonService restarted: $($s.Status)"

test_steps.desc: Verify balloon driver module still running after service cycle
test_steps.guest_run: $d = (driverquery /fo csv | ConvertFrom-Csv) | Where-Object { $_.'Module Name' -eq 'balloon' }; if (-not $d) { throw 'balloon driver not running after service cycle' }; Write-Output "PASS: balloon driver $($d.State) after service stop/start"

cleanup.guest_run: $blnsvr = Get-ChildItem -Recurse C:\AutoHCK\balloon_pkg -Filter blnsvr.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if ($blnsvr) { Stop-Service BalloonService -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; & $blnsvr.FullName -u }
